---
name: Test case request
about: Request a new or improved ModSecurity test case
labels: [test]
---

## Note
English is preferred, but German is also accepted.

## Test case goal
What behavior should the test cover?

## Related ModSecurity rule or behavior
Reference rule IDs, directives, transformations, or processing phases.

## Input/request example
Provide request method, URI, headers, body, and fixtures as needed.

## Expected result
Describe expected status, audit log signal, and response expectations.

## Negative or edge cases
List related negative, bypass, or boundary scenarios.

## Reproducibility notes
Provide environment assumptions and steps for deterministic reproduction.

## Security relevance
Explain why this case matters for security coverage or regression prevention.
